summary: All 13 checklist items passed. Files created/modified per spec. ABBREVIATION_MAP has 14 entries. Regex compiled at module level. encode_queries() has prompt parameter. Config instruction fields correct. encode_targets() unmodified. Beads issues JEM-1ub and JEM-2me closed.

Clean implementation. No anti-patterns (error swallowing, fabricated data, fail-open). Tests cover all acceptance criteria with appropriate mock boundaries. Code style consistent with existing codebase. Two informational observations: Dev-Ops hyphenated variant expands (correct behavior), test config path is relative (matches project convention).
